Approved-after value must be zero or gre: Approved-after value must be zero or greater.
Arabic subscription name is required and: Arabic subscription name is required and must be valid.
Create subscription offers for customer: Create subscription offers for customer discounts and loyalty tiers.
Define customer discount offers and book: Define customer discount offers and booking-threshold eligibility.
English subscription name is required an: English subscription name is required and must be valid.
Manage customer subscription offers and: Manage customer subscription offers and discount tiers used in rentals.
Name: Name
Subscription sequence guidance: Subscription order matters: on create, both approved-after and discount must be greater than the last subscription; on update, both values must remain between previous and next subscriptions.
Subscription order create rule violation: Subscription approved-after and discount must both be greater than the last subscription values.
Subscription order previous rule violati: Subscription approved-after and discount must both be greater than the previous subscription values.
Subscription order next rule violation: Subscription approved-after and discount must both be lower than the next subscription values.
Subscription offer form page subtitle: Define the offer name, discount rate, and booking threshold for activation.
Subscription offer section identity subt: Arabic and English names as shown to staff and customers.
Subscription offer section terms subtitl: Set the discount percentage and number of bookings required to activate this offer.
Subscription offer section description s: Optional notes explaining the offer benefits or internal conditions.
Hint Subscription Offer Arabic Name: Enter the Arabic offer name (2–255 characters, Arabic only).
Hint Subscription Offer English Name: Enter the English offer name (2–255 characters, English only).
Hint Subscription Offer Description: Optional: a short description for staff (up to 500 characters).
Example Subscription Offer Description: Example: Discount for customers after 5 successful bookings.
